# Powerpoint Deck Edit Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# PowerPoint Deck Edit — <Deck Title>

## Edit objective

## Deck-level findings

- Storyline:
- Audience fit:
- Ask / decision clarity:
- Evidence gaps:

## Slide-by-slide review

| Slide | Current issue | Recommended edit | Revised title / message | Notes |
|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 1 |  |  |  |  |

## Revised slide content

### Slide <N>: <Title>

Primary message:

Bullets:

Speaker notes:

Visual/layout recommendation:

## Suggested slide order changes

## Missing slides or appendices

## Fact checks / unresolved questions

## Change notes for reviewer
```
